sections.paragraph:
Original: אשׁמה

Transliteration: 'ashmâh

Phonetic: ash-maw'

BDB Definition:

  1. guiltiness, guilt, offense, sin, wrong-doing
    1. doing wrong, committing a trespass or offense
    2. becoming guilty, guilt
    3. bringing a guilt-offering

Origin: from H817

TWOT entry: 180c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
